objective: scope and implement Wave 0 deterministic context-packet A/B for AgentOps context usefulness

tracker_health.reason: bd ready succeeded and existing parent epic soc-rn8k is open; focused Wave 0 tasks are created from this discovery.

done_criteria: Wave 0 contract defines context_off/context_on and explicit deferrals
Context A/B is a separate eval axis, not an ABBaselineMode overload
context_off/context_on legs use isolated AO_AGENTS_DIR fixture roots
context mode preserves hooks and never emits AGENTOPS_HOOKS_DISABLED=1
minimal scorecard records per-case context delta, decision evidence, ignored-context evidence, and degraded reasons
CLI exposes context A/B without confusing skill/hook baseline mode
deterministic eval suite includes helpful-context and ignored-context cases

test_levels.rationale: Wave 0 changes eval DTOs, runner orchestration, CLI flags, fixture roots, contracts, and command tests. Deterministic unit/integration coverage is required; lifecycle and live runtime variance remain deferred.
